offline.banner: You're offline. Some features may be unavailable.

loading.title: Getting your session ready
loading.subtitle: Hrayem is checking your app version, consent state, and profile before opening the app.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your games, profile, and session in sync across launches.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start with email and password, then finish your profile before entering the app.
register.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm the account, then sign in to finish consent sync and profile setup.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: A password reset link was sent to your email.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password to finish the recovery flow.

reconsent.title: Please review the latest terms
reconsent.subtitle: Hrayem needs your consent for the current Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before you continue.

profileSetup.title: Finish your profile
profileSetup.subtitle: Add the basics now so other players can recognize you in events, chat, and player lists.
profileSetup.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is needed to choose a profile picture.

forceUpdate.title: Update required
forceUpdate.subtitle: A new version of Hrayem is available. Please update to continue.

launchError.title: We couldn't finish app startup
launchError.subtitle: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, restart the app once your connection is stable.

profileError.title: We couldn't load your profile
profileError.subtitle: Please try again. Your account is signed in, but the profile data is still needed before the app can continue.

consentError.title: We couldn't load your consent status
consentError.subtitle: Please try again so Hrayem can verify your current terms acceptance.

validation.password: Enter a password with at least 6 characters.
validation.acceptTerms: You need to accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
validation.city: Choose one of the supported cities.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: That email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.oauthCancelled: The sign-in flow was cancelled before completion.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: You're offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.callback: The sign-in callback could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.pushToken: Push notifications could not be registered on this device.
errors.logoutFailed: We couldn't finish logout cleanly. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
auth.passwordRecoveryReady: Set a new password to finish your recovery flow.
auth.logoutPartial: You were logged out on this device. Remote cleanup may take a moment.

foundation.title: Project foundation is ready
foundation.subtitle: This screen verifies the shared client infrastructure before product features begin.
foundation.sentrySent: A Sentry test error was sent.
foundation.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
foundation.errorFallbackBody: The foundation screen hit an unexpected error.

home.title: Home feed
home.subtitle: Browse upcoming games in your city, adjust filters, and jump into event detail without leaving the main shell.

upcoming.title: Upcoming games
upcoming.placeholder: This stub matches the final home feed position. Real event cards, filters, and pagination land in Milestone 4.
upcoming.secondaryPlaceholder: Upcoming games is the default home tab, and foreground refresh now reuses the shared React Query focus wiring.

availablePlayers.title: Available players
availablePlayers.placeholder: This stub reserves the passive-matchmaking surface for players who post availability in the current city.
availablePlayers.secondaryPlaceholder: The tab, title, and layout are final here, while the real availability list and actions arrive in Milestone 6.

eventDetail.title: Event detail
eventDetail.subtitle: Review the venue, organizer, and confirmed players, then share the game link from the final detail route.
eventDetail.placeholder: This screen reserves the final event detail route while Milestone 4 adds real event data, sharing, and venue fields.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: The chat route exists in the shell so event detail and My Games can already target it safely.
chat.placeholder: Realtime messages, message history, and read-only states arrive in later milestones.

createEvent.title: Create event
createEvent.subtitle: Set the sport, schedule, venue, and skill range in one scrollable form before publishing the game.
createEvent.placeholder: The final create-event form will add sport, date, time, venue, player count, and skill range in the next milestone.

addVenue.title: Add venue
addVenue.subtitle: This modal route is reserved for the venue-creation step from the create-event flow.
addVenue.placeholder: Venue search and crowdsourced venue creation arrive in Milestone 4.

skillLevel.title: Skill level
skillLevel.subtitle: This modal route is reserved for the required skill declaration flow.
skillLevel.placeholder: The real skill-level picker appears when event creation or joining needs it.

myGames.title: My games
myGames.subtitle: Track the games you organize or already confirmed for, while Past stays reserved for later post-game work.
myGames.upcomingPlaceholder: This section will list games you organize or joined once the event data flow is implemented.
myGames.errorTitle: We couldn't load your upcoming games
myGames.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen My Games once you're back online.
myGames.emptyBody: Once you create or confirm a game, it will appear here in date order.
myGames.pastPlaceholder: This section will later host no-show reporting and thumbs-up prompts for completed events.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your profile tab now has its final place in the shell, while editable stats and connections arrive later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Settings is wired into the final shell so language, notifications, logout, and account deletion have a stable home.
settings.placeholder: Notification preferences and editable app settings stay stubbed until their milestone work begins.

accountDeletion.title: Delete account
accountDeletion.subtitle: This route reserves the App Store-required account deletion flow before the destructive backend work lands.
accountDeletion.placeholder: The irreversible delete-account flow is intentionally left as a stub until its backend effects are implemented.

playerProfile.title: Player profile
playerProfile.subtitle: This snippet route is ready for event-detail and availability navigation.
playerProfile.placeholder: Player stats, thumbs-up indicators, and reporting actions arrive in later milestones.

postAvailability.title: Post availability
postAvailability.subtitle: This route reserves the availability posting flow from the Available players tab.
postAvailability.placeholder: The real form for sport, date range, and time preference arrives in Milestone 6.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while handling this event. Please try again.

feed.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen the feed once you're back online.
feed.emptyBody: No games matched this filter set. Be the first to create one.

detail.loadingSubtitle: Fetching the latest venue, organizer, and player details for this game.
detail.errorSubtitle: The event detail route is ready, but this game could not be loaded right now.
detail.errorBody: Please try again. If the link is old or the event was removed, this detail may no longer be available.
detail.skillRangeNote: Players outside this range can still join. The range is there to set expectations before someone joins.
detail.noDescription: No extra notes were added for this game.
detail.confirmedPlayersEmpty: No confirmed players are visible yet beyond the organizer.
detail.shareMessage: {{sport}} at {{venue}} on {{date}} — join me on Hrayem! {{url}}

state.joinBody: Tap below to claim a confirmed spot if one is still open.
state.joinWaitlistBody: This game is currently full. New joins will go onto the waitlist in FIFO order.
state.organizerBody: Organizers stay confirmed automatically and can manage this game from here.
state.confirmedBody: You're in. If your plans change before the game starts, leave here and the waitlist will promote automatically.
state.waitlistedBody: If a confirmed player leaves, the first waitlisted player is promoted automatically.
state.cancelledBody: The organizer cancelled this game. Join, leave, and organizer actions are now closed.
state.finishedBody: This game already ended, so organizer and join actions are no longer available.
state.closedTitle: This game is no longer open
state.closedBody: Join and leave actions are only available while the game is still upcoming and active.

join.skillRequired: Choose your skill level for this sport before joining this game.
join.skillModalSubtitle: We need your current level for this sport before Hrayem can join the game for you.
join.successWaitlisted: You're on the waitlist for this game.
join.warningBody: This game is set for {{range}} players. Your level is {{level}}. You can still join, but the organizer set this range to find players at a similar level. Continue?

errors.unavailable: This game is no longer open for new joins.
errors.organizerCannotJoin: The organizer cannot join their own game.

errors.unavailable: This game can no longer be left from the app.
errors.organizerCannotLeave: The organizer cannot leave their own game.

create.skillHelper: This range helps set expectations. Players outside it can still join in later milestones.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional note about format, level, or what players should bring.
create.skillRequired: Choose your skill level for this sport before the event can be created.

errors.validation: The event details need another look before they can be sent.

validation.skillRange: The minimum skill must be lower than or equal to the maximum skill.
validation.endTime: The end time must be later than the start time.
validation.futureStart: The game must start in the future.

edit.title: Edit event
edit.subtitle: Adjust the venue, schedule, player count, and notes for this game before it starts.
edit.loadingBody: We're filling the current event values into the form now.
edit.sportLocked: Sport stays locked after creation so player stats and event history remain consistent.

errors.validation: The updated event details need another look before they can be saved.
errors.playerCountTooLow: You can't reduce the total player count below the number of confirmed players already in the game.
errors.unavailable: This event can no longer be edited from the app.
errors.unavailableBody: Only the organizer can edit an upcoming active game.

venue.noMatch: No matching venue was found in your city yet.

errors.missing: The selected venue could not be found anymore.
errors.cityRequired: Choose your city in the profile before adding a new venue.

skillLevel.modalSubtitle: We need your current level for this sport before Hrayem can create the game.

description.1: I'm just starting out or I play casually.
description.2: I play regularly and know the fundamentals well.
description.3: I'm competitive and comfortable in strong games.
description.4: I compete seriously or play at tournament level.

errors.saveFailed: Your skill level could not be saved. Please try again.

organizerTools.title: Organizer tools
organizerTools.body: Keep the game accurate, remove a player if needed, or cancel the event before it starts.

errors.forbidden: Only the organizer can use these event controls.

cancel.confirmBody: Confirmed and waitlisted players will be notified right away, and the chat will become read-only.

errors.unavailable: This game can no longer be cancelled from the app.

removePlayer.success: The player was removed from this game.
removePlayer.confirmBody: {{player}} will be removed from this game. If someone is on the waitlist, the first player will be promoted automatically.
